name: Secrets of the National Trust with Alan Titchmarsh
original_name: Secrets of the National Trust with Alan Titchmarsh
overview: Alan Titchmarsh and a host of familiar faces have a privileged insider’s view into some of Britain’s most intriguing historical homes and gardens. Alan visits a number of fascinating buildings including Hardwick Hall, Kingston Lacy and he even sets foot inside a notorious Workhouse. Throughout the series, Alan will be joined by the likes of Dan Jones, Angellica Bell, Suzannah Lipscomb and more famous faces.

trailers.title: Secrets Of The National Trust With Alan Titchmarsh | Channel 5
